message:
fix: handle single-quoted strings in DOT split_dot_by

The split_dot_by function only handled double-quoted strings, but not
single-quoted ones. This caused incorrect splitting when single-quoted
identifiers contained semicolons (e.g., 'foo;bar' -> B).

- Change in_quote from bool to Option<char> to track quote type
- Check for both '"' and '\'' when entering/exiting quote mode
- Add test for single-quoted identifiers with semicolons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
